# Pull Request Template

Thank you for your contribution!

## Summary
- What does this change do?
- Why is it needed?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Refactor/cleanup
- [ ] CI/Build

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (README, docs/guides, configs examples)
- [ ] Security/privacy considerations reviewed (no secrets committed; respects policy gating)

## Related issues
- Fixes #
- Related #

## Screenshots/Notes
- Optional: include screenshots, logs, or benchmarks.
